tasks.title: Registrar web contract/client test hardening pack 1
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: strengthen existing registrar web typed client/contract tests (list/detail/read scaffolds) for empty-data, nullability, and shape assertions. Contract-only; no new UI actions/CTAs and no API behavior expansion.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web test -- registrar-client.test.ts registrar-contract-inventory.test.ts && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck
